#### \
Authors: *Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj*\

## `echofinemap`: Echoverse module: Statistical and functional fine-mapping functions.

This R package is part of the *echoverse* suite that supports
[`echolocatoR`](https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR): an automated
genomic fine-mapping pipeline.

If you use `echofinemap`, please cite:

> Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: an
> automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping
> pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658.
> <https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658>

## Installation

``` r

if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echofinemap")
library(echofinemap)
```

## Documentation

### [Website](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap)

### [Getting started](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/articles/echofinemap)

Sinai](https://icahn.mssm.edu/about/departments-offices/neuroscience)

# Package index

## Fine-mapping methods

Individual statistical fine-mapping method wrappers

- [`ABF()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/ABF.md) :
  Fine-map with ABF

- [`SUSIE()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/SUSIE.md)
  : Fine-map with SUSIE

- [`FINEMAP()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/FINEMAP.md)
  :

  Fine-map locus with `FINEMAP`

- [`PAINTOR()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/PAINTOR.md)
  : PAINTOR: fine-map

- [`POLYFUN()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/POLYFUN.md)
  : Run PolyFun+SUSIE fine-mapping pipeline

- [`COJO()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/COJO.md)
  :

  Run *GCTA-COJO*

## Pipeline

Run one or more fine-mapping methods in a unified pipeline

- [`multifinemap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/multifinemap.md)
  : Multi-fine-map
- [`lfm()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/lfm.md) :
  List fine-mapping methods

## PolyFun utilities

Helper functions for PolyFun installation and prior computation

- [`POLYFUN_compute_priors()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/POLYFUN_compute_priors.md)
  : PolyFun: recompute priors
- [`POLYFUN_help()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/POLYFUN_help.md)
  : POLYFUN help
- [`POLYFUN_install()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/POLYFUN_install.md)
  : Install PolyFun

## Data utilities

Column checks, cleanup, and path management

- [`drop_finemap_cols()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/drop_finemap_cols.md)
  : Drop fine-mapping columns
- [`check_required_cols()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/check_required_cols.md)
  : Check for necessary columns
- [`required_cols()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/required_cols.md)
  : Table of required columns
- [`create_method_path()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echofinemap/reference/create_method_path.md)
  : Create method path
